message:
fix: TestIsInGasTownWorkspace passes when run from GT workspace

The test assumed the process cwd was outside any GT workspace, but when
run from a crew worktree (e.g. crew/joe) it is already inside one. Fix by
chdir-ing to a non-workspace temp dir before the negative assertion,
so the test properly verifies both positive and negative cases regardless
of where it is run.

Fixes: gt-egj26

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
